Localization.Description: Operations on a task in the task scheduler

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} deleted the task "{object.name}" in the task scheduler on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} updated the task "{object.name}" in the task scheduler on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} created the task "{object.name}" in the task scheduler on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} disabled the task "{object.name}" in the task scheduler on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} enabled the task "{object.name}" in the task scheduler on host {event_src.host}
